hooks.command: $raw = [Console]::In.ReadToEnd(); try { $j = $raw | ConvertFrom-Json; $msg = if ($j.message) { $j.message } else { 'Claude 알림' } } catch { $msg = 'Claude 알림' }; $proj = Split-Path -Leaf (Get-Location); $text = "*[Claude]*`n• 📁 $proj`n• 🔔 권한 요청"; $payload = @{text=$text} | ConvertTo-Json -Compress; $body = [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetBytes($payload); Invoke-RestMethod -Uri $env:SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL -Method Post -ContentType 'application/json; charset=utf-8' -Body $body | Out-Null

$proj = Split-Path -Leaf (Get-Location); $msg = "*[Claude]*\n• 📁 $proj\n• ✅ 작업 완료"; $body = [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetBytes("{`"text`":`"$msg`"}"); Invoke-RestMethod -Uri $env:SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL -Method Post -ContentType 'application/json; charset=utf-8' -Body $body | Out-Null
jq -r '.tool_response.filePath // .tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; npx prettier --write "$f" --ignore-unknown; } 2>/dev/null || true
